# Nema Uluwatu

> Nema Uluwatu offers premium boutique and affordable villa accommodation in Uluwatu, Bali, Indonesia. The property features a managed portfolio of 12 luxury studio villas, providing high-end and affordable hospitality and streamlined booking experiences for young travelers.

## Property Details
- Location: Uluwatu, Bali, Indonesia
- Accommodation Type: 12 Studio Villas
- Focus: Premium affordable boutique hospitality for young people, seamless guest experience, and luxury aesthetics.

## Official Links
- [Home](https://www.nemauluwatu.com/): Nema Uluwatu Official Website
- [Direct Bookings](https://www.nemauluwatu.com/): Direct reservations and availability
- [Google Maps](https://maps.app.goo.gl/hbaMXKUttdA7cimC7): Google Reviews and Accommodation Address
- [Airbnb](https://www.airbnb.com.au/rooms/1507896689130551512): Official Airbnb listing and guest reviews
- [Booking.com](https://www.booking.com/hotel/id/nema-uluwatu.en-gb.html): Official Booking.com listing and guest reviews
- [Expedia](https://www.expedia.com.au/Pecatu-Hotels-Nema-Uluwatu.h129075028.Hotel-Information): Official Expedia listing and guest reviews
